title: Optimized QOL
description: Amazing performance and uninvasive Quality of Life mods!
body:
A modpack featuring amazing performance, ambient sounds and visuals and uninvasive Quality of Life mods!

The focus of this modpack is to increase the enjoyability of the end-users experience while staying as close to vanilla as possible. it includes only client-side features. Feel free to add or remove any mods! I recommend EssentialGUI Includes mods like
Sodium, Lithium, Starlight
for best performance! Features:
Amazing Performance!
Fast and Stable startup
Frequent updates
All the Quality of Life mods you need
Use the LITE version on low-end PCs
